sql.query: SELECT d.id,d.templateId,d.templateTaskId,d.dependsOnTemplateTaskId,d.dependencyType,t.taskName,ts.stageName,dep.taskName AS dependsOnTaskName,ds.stageName AS dependsOnStageName FROM tbl_template_task_dependencies d INNER JOIN tbl_template_tasks t ON t.id=d.templateTaskId AND t.tenantId=d.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_template_stages ts ON ts.id=t.templateStageId AND ts.tenantId=t.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_template_tasks dep ON dep.id=d.dependsOnTemplateTaskId AND dep.tenantId=d.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_template_stages ds ON ds.id=dep.templateStageId AND ds.tenantId=dep.tenantId WHERE d.templateId=:templateId AND d.tenantId=:tenantId ORDER BY ts.sortOrder,t.sortOrder,ds.sortOrder,dep.sortOrder
